tables.name: pdb_entries
tables.schema_sql: pdb_id STRING, title STRING, method STRING, method_full STRING, resolution FLOAT, r_work FLOAT, r_free FLOAT, organism STRING, deposition_date STRING, release_date STRING, citation_doi STRING

tables.name: pdb_uniprot_mapping
tables.schema_sql: pdb_id STRING, chain_id STRING, uniprot_accession STRING, res_beg INT, res_end INT, pdb_beg STRING, pdb_end STRING, sp_beg INT, sp_end INT

tables.name: pdb_validation
tables.schema_sql: pdb_id STRING, clashscore FLOAT, percent_ramachandran_outliers FLOAT, percent_rotamer_outliers FLOAT, angles_rmsz FLOAT, bonds_rmsz FLOAT

tables.name: pdb_taxonomy
tables.schema_sql: pdb_id STRING, taxonomy_id INT, organism STRING

tables.name: pdb_ligands
tables.schema_sql: pdb_id STRING, ligand_id STRING, ligand_name STRING, ligand_type STRING, formula STRING, formula_weight FLOAT

tables.name: pdb_citations
tables.schema_sql: pdb_id STRING, citation_id STRING, is_primary STRING, title STRING, year INT, journal STRING, volume STRING, page_first STRING, doi STRING, pubmed_id INT, authors STRING

tables.name: pdb_pfam
tables.schema_sql: pdb_id STRING, chain_id STRING, uniprot_accession STRING, pfam_id STRING, coverage FLOAT

tables.name: pdb_sequence_clusters
tables.schema_sql: cluster_id STRING, pdb_entity_id STRING, identity_level INT
